title: tristaniopsis oblongifolia
intro: Tristaniopsis oblongifolia, also known as the water gum or narrow-leaved water gum, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Myrtaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tristaniopsis oblongifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and it has also been used to make a topical cream or salve to treat skin conditions.
